sourceMovie.title: Vicious
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Vicious works as a horror movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The horror and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Ninth Gate
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Vicious clicked for you, The Ninth Gate (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in horror and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Vicious?
faq.answer: Try The Ninth Gate, Fresh, The Hitcher—each shares DNA with Vicious while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Vicious?
faq.answer: Vicious (2025) is best described as Horror, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Vicious worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.0/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this horror lane.
